parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.fsm_sessions (ip, state, counter, session_id, alert_sent, last_seen)
VALUES ($1, 'q0', 0, 'SESS-INIT', FALSE, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (ip) DO UPDATE SET last_seen = public.fsm_sessions.last_seen
RETURNING ip, state, counter, session_id, alert_sent, last_seen;

INSERT INTO public.fsm_sessions (ip, state, counter, session_id, alert_sent, last_seen)
VALUES (
  $1,
  $2,
  $3,
  $4,
  $5,
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (ip) DO UPDATE SET
  state      = EXCLUDED.state,
  counter    = EXCLUDED.counter,
  session_id = EXCLUDED.session_id,
  alert_sent = EXCLUDED.alert_sent,
  last_seen  = NOW();

UPDATE public.incidents
SET
  first_alert_at = COALESCE(first_alert_at, NOW()),
  etat_siem      = LEFT('{{ $json.state_after }}', 5),
  mitre_tech     = COALESCE(mitre_tech, NULLIF('{{ $json.mitre_tech }}', '')),
  mitre_name     = COALESCE(mitre_name, NULLIF('{{ $json.mitre_name }}', '')),
  updated_at     = NOW()
WHERE incident_id = (
  SELECT incident_id
  FROM public.incidents
  WHERE source_ip = '{{ $json.source_ip }}'
    AND status NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'ESCALATED')
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
AND '{{ $json.alert_triggered }}' = 'true'
RETURNING incident_id, etat_siem, first_alert_at, updated_at;
